metadata.name: Request a Loan Against Policy Cash Value

description: A whole life policyholder wants to take a loan against the cash value of their policy.

nodes.task_description: Identify the policyholder and verify their identity.
Determine the available cash value and the maximum loan amount.

expected_outcome.value: Agent calculates the maximum amount the customer can borrow against their policy.

nodes.task_description: Explain the terms of the loan, including the interest rate, and process the loan request.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly explains the loan terms and successfully processes the disbursement of funds.
